description: Anthropic group Claude Code client restriction policy. Applied by ops/anthropic/manage-anthropic-config.py (plan-group-claude-code-only) on every deployable edge Postgres and prod control-plane Postgres. claude_code_only=true means admin UI toggle ON under "Claude Code 客户端限制" → only official Claude Code clients may use the group (non-CC traffic hits ErrClaudeCodeOnly or fallback_group_id). See backend/internal/service/gateway_service.go ErrClaudeCodeOnly and groups.claude_code_only (migration 029).

notes.scope: All non-deleted groups with platform=anthropic on each target DB. Does not touch non-anthropic groups.
notes.fallback_group_id: This pipeline only flips claude_code_only. Configure fallback_group_id per group in admin UI when non-CC clients need a downgrade path.
notes.per_target: Edge and prod each have their own groups table — plan emits one action per target that has any anthropic group not yet at claude_code_only=true.
